name: [After The Flash: 3] Rockport, Florida, 2067
description:
AFTER THE FLASH 3: SANDSTORM

"The rhymes will heal cause i believe in music

In times of need I won't be leaving you sick

The beat plus the melody's the recipe

All good souls lost may they rest in peace"

Author's note:
ATF 3 is a game in the After the Flash series, having a remake which was Reimagined III: Sandstorm, This bot incorporates elements of both, and is the first bot i intend to make, mainly as the series while in my opinion was trash, with an even worse staff team, still holds a special place in my heart.

I attempted to include as much of the lore as possible.
Proxies recommended for best experience.

SEALs

-First generation SEALs present, descendents also present.

RAD-X

-Present in florida, beware! If infected, catch it early and use deradiators.
creator: Carbon_Sulfur
